_comment_2: Tyk Classic API definition for p04-rl-static. The canonical contract is 1000 rps, service-wide (key=service), 429 with Retry-After: 1 above limit, 1 s rolling window.
_comment_3: global_rate_limit applies to every path served by this listen_path with a single shared bucket — exactly matching the canonical 'service-wide' axis.
_comment_4: rate=1000, per=1 means 1000 hits per 1-second window. Tyk's Distributed Rate Limiter (DRL) is a sliding window backed by Redis; with 1200 requests fired in ~1 s we expect ~200 rejections (1200-1000), which lands inside the canonical >=150 +/- 50 envelope.
_comment_5: use_keyless: true — no auth on this profile (matches p01 baseline). Auth is intentionally orthogonal to rate limiting; p03 measures only the rate-limit primitive.
name: bench
